meta.title: Andrew Ng on Vibe Coding
meta.description:
Andrew Ng on vibe coding, ai coding and how it really feels to spend a full day with these coding vibes. 

These are the conversations we continue at AI Dev.

Join us at AI Dev 26 × San Francisco, April 28–29. Tickets available: https://bit.ly/4aiyfNp
